output: {"summary": "Rename from Phalanx to Runsight is approximately 90% complete. Source code and documentation have been successfully updated, but several infrastructure and configuration items remain.", "issues": [{"id": "CI_CONFIG", "description": ".github/workflows/ci.yml still references the phalanx/ directory, which will break CI."}, {"id": "DATABASE_FILES", "description": "phalanx.db and state.db in the root have not been renamed to runsight.db and runsight_state.db."}, {"id": "INFRA_DIRECTORY", "description": "The .phalanx/ directory remains and has not been migrated to .runsight/."}, {"id": "IDE_RULES", "description": ".cursor/rules/phalanx.mdc still exists and should be renamed to runsight.mdc."}, {"id": "GITIGNORE", "description": ".gitignore still references .phalanx/ and phalanx.mdc."}, {"id": "WORKSPACE_CONFIG", "description": "pyproject.toml still references apps/cli/tests, but the CLI app has been dropped."}, {"id": "CLI_TOOL", "description": "The system CLI command is still phalanx and has not been updated to runsight."}], "status": "Review completed with findings."}
